name: Coconut Curry
instructions:
1. Cut the chicken breast into bite-sized chunks. Season with salt and pepper.

2. Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken for 4-5 minutes until golden. Remove and set aside.

3. In the same pan, add the onion and cook for 3 minutes until softened. Add garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute.

4. Add curry powder and stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.

5. Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a gentle simmer. Add the chicken back in.

6. Cook for 10-12 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.

7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve over steamed rice, garnished with fresh cilantro.
simpleInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into chunks and sear until golden.

2. Cook onion, garlic and ginger.

3. Add curry powder, then coconut milk.

4. Return chicken and simmer 10-12 minutes.

5. Season and serve over rice with cilantro.
